title: PLA Navy Liaoning carrier strike group operates southeast of Taiwan
summary: The Pacific Brief assesses the PLAN Liaoning carrier strike group now operates in waters southeast of Taiwan, accompanied by Type 055 and Type 052D escorts, conducting sustained flight operations.
contents:
# PLA Navy Liaoning CSG Operates Southeast of Taiwan

## Assessment
The Pacific Brief defense intelligence analysis confirms the PLA Navy Liaoning carrier strike group maintains operations in waters southeast of Taiwan as of May 1, 2026.

## Force Composition
- CV-16 Liaoning (aircraft carrier)
- CNS Nanchang (101) - Type 055 cruiser
- CNS Taiyuan (131) - Type 052D destroyer
- CNS Nanjing (155) - Type 052D destroyer
- CNS Anyang (599) - Type 054A frigate
- Additional escort vessels tracked via AIS and satellite

## Operational Activity
- Sustained carrier flight operations observed
- J-15 fighter aircraft conducting launch and recovery cycles
- Helicopter operations supporting anti-submarine warfare training
- Group transited Miyako Strait from East China Sea to Philippine Sea

## Analytical Assessment
The deployment represents continued PLA pressure on the first island chain. The Pacific Brief analysts characterize this as capability demonstration rather than immediate conflict preparation, consistent with Beijing's pattern of sustained presence operations.

## Tags
